modAI v0.1.5 is a desktop-first AI workspace release focused on reliability, activation, and real operator workflows.

Highlights
- Capability-aware model routing across code, visual, desktop, and business tasks
- Local-first semantic memory and follow-through reminders that keep work inside the app
- Sandboxed code execution for safer verification before touching the main workspace
- File-based workspace tools with outline, inline editing, and command palette actions
- Cryptomus checkout, device activation flow, and manual bank transfer support
- Native desktop packages for macOS Apple Silicon, macOS Intel, Windows x64, and Linux x64

Why it matters
- modAI is built as its own operator surface, not as a thin wrapper around a generic chat UI
- Teams can move from request to execution, verification, and recall in one place
- The release sharpens the install-to-activation path so buyers reach value faster

Full Changelog: https://github.com/WeAreTheArtMakers/modAI-Asistance/compare/v0.1.4...v0.1.5
